query:
-- SPR101 Lesson 2: The Lords Prayer (360062)
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360062, 'Where in the Gospels is the Lords Prayer found?', 'multiple_choice', '["Matthew 6 and Luke 11","Mark 6 and John 11","Matthew 5 and Mark 11","Luke 6 and John 17"]', 'Matthew 6 and Luke 11', 1),
(360062, 'What does hallowed be thy name mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["Gods name is hollow","May Gods name be kept holy","Gods name is hidden","We should not say Gods name"]', 'May Gods name be kept holy', 2),
(360062, 'What does Thy kingdom come primarily refer to?', 'multiple_choice', '["A political kingdom","Gods reign and rule in hearts and the world","A physical location","An earthly government"]', 'Gods reign and rule in hearts and the world', 3),
(360062, 'The phrase daily bread represents what type of need?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only spiritual needs","Only physical needs","Both physical and spiritual provision","Luxury items"]', 'Both physical and spiritual provision', 4),
(360062, 'What condition is attached to receiving forgiveness in the Lords Prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Perfect behavior","Forgiving others","Financial giving","Church attendance"]', 'Forgiving others', 5),
(360062, 'What does lead us not into temptation ask God to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Remove all temptation","Guide us away from situations of testing","Make us immune to sin","Punish tempters"]', 'Guide us away from situations of testing', 6),
(360062, 'The doxology For thine is the kingdom power and glory emphasizes what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Human achievement","Gods sovereignty and eternal nature","Church authority","Political power"]', 'Gods sovereignty and eternal nature', 7),
(360062, 'Why did Jesus give this prayer as a model?', 'multiple_choice', '["To be recited word-for-word only","To provide a pattern for prayer","To replace all other prayers","To be used only in church"]', 'To provide a pattern for prayer', 8),
(360062, 'What does addressing God as Our Father reveal about our relationship with Him?', 'multiple_choice', '["Distant formality","Intimate family relationship","Fear and trembling","Business partnership"]', 'Intimate family relationship', 9),
(360062, 'The phrase deliver us from evil asks protection from what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only physical harm","The evil one and all forms of evil","Only financial loss","Only sickness"]', 'The evil one and all forms of evil', 10),
(360062, 'How does the Lords Prayer balance personal and corporate elements?', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Uses Our and us showing corporate nature while addressing personal needs', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 3: Developing a Personal Prayer Life (360063)
(360063, 'What time did Jesus often pray according to Mark 1:35?', 'multiple_choice', '["Midday","Evening","Very early in the morning","Midnight"]', 'Very early in the morning', 1),
(360063, 'What is a prayer closet according to Matthew 6:6?', 'multiple_choice', '["A special room in the church","A private place for focused prayer","A storage room for prayer books","A public prayer station"]', 'A private place for focused prayer', 2),
(360063, 'Which practice helps maintain consistency in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Praying only when you feel like it","Establishing a regular prayer time","Waiting for emergencies","Avoiding routine"]', 'Establishing a regular prayer time', 3),
(360063, 'What is a prayer journal used for?', 'multiple_choice', '["Recording answered prayers and prayer requests","Writing sermons","Taking notes in church","Keeping financial records"]', 'Recording answered prayers and prayer requests', 4),
(360063, 'According to 1 Thessalonians 5:17 how often should we pray?', 'multiple_choice', '["Once a week","Once a day","Without ceasing","Only in emergencies"]', 'Without ceasing', 5),
(360063, 'What is praying Scripture or praying the Word?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reading the Bible aloud","Using Bible verses as the basis for prayer","Memorizing Scripture","Writing new Scripture"]', 'Using Bible verses as the basis for prayer', 6),
(360063, 'What common obstacle to prayer does Jesus address in Matthew 6:7?', 'multiple_choice', '["Praying too quietly","Using vain repetitions","Praying alone","Praying in the morning"]', 'Using vain repetitions', 7),
(360063, 'What role does the Holy Spirit play in our prayer life according to Romans 8:26?', 'multiple_choice', '["He replaces our prayers","He intercedes for us with groanings","He prevents us from praying","He only listens"]', 'He intercedes for us with groanings', 8),
(360063, 'What is the benefit of having a prayer list?', 'multiple_choice', '["To impress others","To organize and remember prayer needs","To limit prayer time","To avoid spontaneous prayer"]', 'To organize and remember prayer needs', 9),
(360063, 'What does watching and praying mean according to Matthew 26:41?', 'multiple_choice', '["Looking at a clock while praying","Being spiritually alert and prayerful","Watching TV and praying","Praying with eyes open"]', 'Being spiritually alert and prayerful', 10),
(360063, 'Describe three practical strategies for overcoming distractions during prayer.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Set specific time and place remove distractions use prayer journal', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 4: Intercessory Prayer (360064)
(360064, 'What does it mean to stand in the gap according to Ezekiel 22:30?', 'multiple_choice', '["To fill a physical hole","To intercede on behalf of others","To guard a city gate","To build a wall"]', 'To intercede on behalf of others', 1),
(360064, 'Who is described as our great Intercessor in Hebrews 7:25?', 'multiple_choice', '["Angels","Prophets","Jesus Christ","Priests"]', 'Jesus Christ', 2),
(360064, 'What did Abraham intercede for in Genesis 18?', 'multiple_choice', '["His own prosperity","The city of Sodom","A new wife","More land"]', 'The city of Sodom', 3),
(360064, 'According to 1 Timothy 2:1-2 who should we pray for?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only believers","All people including kings and authorities","Only our family","Only our church"]', 'All people including kings and authorities', 4),
(360064, 'What is the difference between petition and intercession?', 'multiple_choice', '["No difference","Petition is for self intercession is for others","Intercession is louder","Petition is more spiritual"]', 'Petition is for self intercession is for others', 5),
(360064, 'How did Moses intercede for Israel after the golden calf incident?', 'multiple_choice', '["He condemned them","He offered himself in their place","He ignored them","He left them"]', 'He offered himself in their place', 6),
(360064, 'What does James 5:16 say about the prayer of a righteous person?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is ineffective","It is powerful and effective","It is unnecessary","It is only for emergencies"]', 'It is powerful and effective', 7),
(360064, 'What is burden-bearing in intercessory prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Carrying physical weights","Feeling the weight of others needs in prayer","Complaining about problems","Avoiding difficult prayers"]', 'Feeling the weight of others needs in prayer', 8),
(360064, 'According to Colossians 4:12 how did Epaphras pray for the Colossians?', 'multiple_choice', '["Casually","Wrestling in prayer for them","Briefly","Only occasionally"]', 'Wrestling in prayer for them', 9),
(360064, 'What is the role of faith in intercessory prayer according to Mark 11:24?', 'multiple_choice', '["Faith is optional","Believe you have received what you ask","Faith limits prayer","Faith replaces prayer"]', 'Believe you have received what you ask', 10),
(360064, 'Explain how Jesus prayer in John 17 serves as a model for intercessory prayer.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Jesus prayed for disciples and future believers showing selfless intercession', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 5: Fasting and Prayer (360065)
(360065, 'How long did Jesus fast in the wilderness according to Matthew 4:2?', 'multiple_choice', '["7 days","21 days","40 days","3 days"]', '40 days', 1),
(360065, 'What type of fast is described in Isaiah 58 as pleasing to God?', 'multiple_choice', '["Fasting for show","Fasting that leads to justice and compassion","Fasting only from certain foods","Fasting once a year"]', 'Fasting that leads to justice and compassion', 2),
(360065, 'According to Matthew 6:16-18 how should we fast?', 'multiple_choice', '["With a sad face to show devotion","Secretly without drawing attention","Publicly so others can join","Only in groups"]', 'Secretly without drawing attention', 3),
(360065, 'What did Daniels partial fast consist of according to Daniel 10:3?', 'multiple_choice', '["No food at all","No pleasant food meat or wine","Only water","Only bread"]', 'No pleasant food meat or wine', 4),
(360065, 'What is the primary spiritual purpose of fasting?', 'multiple_choice', '["Weight loss","Humbling oneself and seeking God intensely","Impressing others","Earning salvation"]', 'Humbling oneself and seeking God intensely', 5),
(360065, 'In Acts 13:2-3 what did the church do before sending out Paul and Barnabas?', 'multiple_choice', '["Had a feast","Fasted and prayed","Took a vote","Consulted the Romans"]', 'Fasted and prayed', 6),
(360065, 'What did Jesus say about why His disciples did not fast in Mark 2:19-20?', 'multiple_choice', '["Fasting was abolished","The bridegroom was with them","They were too weak","Fasting was only for prophets"]', 'The bridegroom was with them', 7),
(360065, 'What is a corporate fast?', 'multiple_choice', '["A business diet program","A group of believers fasting together","Fasting from work","A government mandate"]', 'A group of believers fasting together', 8),
(360065, 'According to Joel 2:12 what should accompany fasting?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride","Returning to God with all your heart","Public announcements","Fancy clothes"]', 'Returning to God with all your heart', 9),
(360065, 'What breakthrough came through prayer and fasting in Esther 4:16?', 'multiple_choice', '["Financial prosperity","Deliverance of the Jewish people","Military victory","A new king"]', 'Deliverance of the Jewish people', 10),
(360065, 'Describe the different types of fasts mentioned in Scripture.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Absolute fast partial fast and normal fast with various durations', 11);
